title: Error Standardization: Bindings API (clone of #7483)
body:
Richer errors in Dapr for the **Bindings API**.

> **Note:** This is a clone of #7483, assigned to myself to track my contribution to the error standardization efforts.

## Scope of work

- [x] Choose errors in the Bindings API to enrich
- [x] Follow the steps outlined in the README for each error being updated

## Definition of done

- [x] Update errors in the Bindings API (`InvokeOutputBinding`)
- [x] Update the unit tests
- [ ] Write integration tests to cover each updated error

## Keep in mind

Unless a major version is being released, we can't change the API (HTTP/gRPC status codes and error codes must stay the same). An exception is `StatusCode.UNKNOWN` which should be converted to a specific status.

For each error being updated, use the helper functions:
- `WithErrorInfo()` - Required
- `WithResourceInfo()`
- `WithHelpLink()`
- `WithFieldViolation()`

## Reference PRs

- State API error standardization: dapr/dapr#7507
- PubSub API error standardization: dapr/dapr#7626
- Bindings API (this work): dapr/dapr#9816
